narrative:
East Jefferson North (precinct in Mercer County) has 582 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.2 percentage points.
